title: How to Steal Customers From Giants 600x Bigger than Your Startup | Pigment, Eléonore Crespo
summary: Eléonore Crespo, co-founder of Pigment, discusses how a Paris-based startup with an AI performance management platform competes against enterprise giants 600x larger. She explains why companies like Google rely on spreadsheets for strategic planning, the advantages of building a full enterprise platform from day one, and her hiring philosophy focused on raising organizational standards.
writeup: Eléonore Crespo, co-founder of Pigment, explains how a Paris-based startup with an AI performance management platform competes against enterprise incumbents 600 times its size. She argues that large companies including Google still depend on spreadsheets for strategic planning, which opens room for a dedicated product, and she makes the case for building a full enterprise platform from day one rather than scaling up later. The discussion also covers her hiring philosophy, which centers on bringing in people who raise the organization's standards.
